creator: russ.haley@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

We have been working on a new port for lua 5.4 - which is still in a beta phase (work2). I'd like to request an exp-run to see what happens. The last exp-run for Lua that I am aware of was done with 5.3.3 last year. The report is in bug 220281.

The patch for Lua 5.4 is in review here: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D14709

To apply the patch create a lua54 directory under ports/lang/.
